entities.name: MADHYA PRADESH
entities.description: State in Central India where the study was conducted

entities.name: CENTRAL INDIA
entities.description: Region where Madhya Pradesh is located

entities.name: VERTISOLS
entities.description: Soils characterized by high montmorillintic clay, swelling and shrinking characteristics, and poor hydraulic conductivity

entities.name: RAINY SEASON FALLOWS
entities.description: Lands left uncultivated during the kharif season, particularly in Vertisol areas

entities.name: LAND DEGRADATION
entities.description: The decline in the quality and productivity of land

entities.name: AGRICULTURE PRODUCTION
entities.description: The total output of agricultural crops

entities.name: SOYBEAN
entities.description: A short-duration pulse crop recommended for cultivation in kharif fallows

entities.name: WHEAT
entities.description: A crop typically grown during the rabi season on lands that were fallow during the kharif season

entities.name: PULSE CROPS
entities.description: A category of crops, including soybean, suggested for utilization of kharif fallows

entities.name: IRS-WIFS DATA
entities.description: Wide Field Sensor data from Indian Remote Sensing Satellites used for mapping fallows

entities.name: GEO-REFERENCING
entities.description: A process used in the analytical approach to align multi-temporal WiFS data

entities.name: RADIOMETRIC NORMALIZATION
entities.description: A process used to correct radiometric differences in multi-temporal WiFS data

entities.name: ERDAS/IMAGINE
entities.description: Software used for the delineation of kharif fallows

entities.name: GAUSSIAN MAXIMUM LIKELIHOOD ALGORITHM
entities.description: A per-pixel algorithm used for the delineation of kharif fallows

entities.name: FIELD CHECK
entities.description: Limited ground verification used to validate the delineation of fallows

entities.name: AGRO-ECOSYSTEM SUSTAINABILITY
entities.description: The ability of the agricultural ecosystem to maintain productivity and health over time
